title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 30–33, this part focuses on Unknown person #28, Tama, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #29, Unknown person #30, Unknown person #31 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: A friend of the straw hat gang!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can stray from a man's path... you can stray from a woman's path... but you can't stray from the path of mankind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: scatter, my friends... to the true sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You don't know who's behind the rebellion?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's an under- ground organiza- lion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not even its members know the identity of the ringleader.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since no one knows who the leader is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....there's no way for us to find out from the outside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ...will be too risky for the kingdom.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
